items.title: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on McDonald's, Raises Price Target to $325
items.description: JP Morgan  analyst John Ivankoe   maintains McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $305 to $325.

items.title: Consumer Discretionary In The Great Rotation
McDonald's India (W&S) Celebrates Protein Week, Encourages Everyday Protein Choices
items.description: In the run-up to World Protein Day on 27th February, McDonald's India (West & South), owned and operated by Westlife Foodworld, is celebrating Protein Week, reinforcing its leadership in nutrition-led innovation. Making protein more accessible, affordable and customizable, Indian consumers can use the McDonald's app to explore these nutritious offerings and avail of protein burgers starting at just INR 69. Enhancing this convenience, consumers ordering via McDelivery can also enjoy free delivery

items.title: Billionaire Investor Bets On Chipotle While Stock Trades Near 52-Week Low
items.description: CMG underperformed peers McDonald's and Starbucks, falling 28.96% over 12 months, even as Dan Loeb invested $174.8M in the fast-casual chain.

items.title: Here's How Much You Would Have Made Owning McDonald's Stock In The Last 20 Years
